meta.title: Marketing — Multichannel Automation
meta.description: Build automated journeys, launch campaigns and engage customers across every channel with Solvefy's marketing platform.

hero.title: Boost your sales with <accent>smart broadcasts and high-impact communication.</accent>
hero.subtitle: Connect with your customers directly through the channels they use most. With Solvefy Marketing, your company automates relationships via WhatsApp (Official API), SMS, RCS and Voice messages on a single platform. Use our quick-send templates, track delivery reports in real time and simplify your operations.

painCards.title: The technology that <accent>simplifies your sending</accent> and guarantees results.

automation.title: Qualified List.
automation.desc: Avoid wasting credits on non-existent or disconnected numbers. Our platform automatically validates active numbers before launching your campaign, ensuring your message reaches real users.

conversion.title: Real Metrics.
conversion.desc: Have complete control over every campaign's delivery. Monitor exact send, receipt and read rates in real time to understand audience behavior with no room for guesswork.

centralized.title: Profitable Channels.
centralized.desc: Find out which channel delivers the best return for your business. Test performance across WhatsApp, SMS, RCS and Voice on the same platform and direct your investment to the channel that drives the most engagement and real conversions.

integrations.title: More than 20,000 companies are already accelerating their results with Solvefy:

channelUseCase.subtitle: See on screen how your customers receive each interaction and understand why our formats convert more than traditional broadcasts.

pricing.title: Get the best cost-benefit in the market with exclusive advantages!
pricing.subtitle: Send WhatsApp, RCS, SMS, Email and Voice with personalized prepaid packages.
pricing.annualSave: Save up to 39% by going annual
pricing.cardNote: *Use all credits on a single channel or split across multiple.
pricing.footerNote: Important: Plan subscriptions don't include channel send credits. Broadcasts are billed by usage and can be purchased separately as standalone credits.

next.name: Essential Pro
next.desc: Discover the power of new channels to reach your customers.

fast.name: Evolution Pro
fast.desc: Expand your marketing and sales strategies to reach your goals.

best.name: Advanced Pro
best.desc: Send more messages and boost your results even further.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.ideal: In today's digital marketing, depending on manual processes or fragmented data means losing money. With Solvefy Marketing, you orchestrate your channels through a robust, intuitive platform built for high-performance teams.
enterprise.b2: Broadcast scheduling with automatic number validation
